name: Ukrainian Meat & Fish Stew
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Herring, fresh, cubed, skinned, and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the herring in a bowl and cover with 1 quart of milk. Soak for 8-12 hours.
2. Pat the herring dry and remove any bones.
3. Fry onions and garlic in 2 tablespoons butter until golden brown.
4. Pan-fry ground meats separately and add to the food processor.
5. Add chopped onion, garlic, herring, and potatoes to the food processor and process until smooth.
6. Stir in yogurt and egg yolks. Add salt and black pepper.
7. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
8. Add shredded carrots to the mixture.
9. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry, then fold into the mixture.
10. Transfer the mixture to a buttered baking dish. Sprinkle with bread crumbs and goat cheese ().
11. Dot with additional butter and bake for 45 minutes.
12. Serve hot.
